target:
# Search for images in promo or marketing sections that might show the full client
curl -s "http://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=www.fulltiltpoker.com/images/com/en/content*&output=text&limit=100&from=20080101&to=20101231&filter=statuscode:200" 2>&1 | grep -i "table\|game\|play\|screen\|shot\|client" | head -30
